message:
fix(interpreter): report actual register index in overflow error instead of u32::MAX

baseline_interpreter.rs:
- When checked_add overflows during function call argument setup,
  report the actual starting register index (args.start) in the
  RegisterOutOfBounds error instead of u32::MAX, which was misleading
  and obscured the real source of the overflow.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
